subcodes.first_line: This is the month wherein was born He Who beareth the Most Great Name, Whose appearance hath caused the limbs of humankind to quake
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا شهر فیه ولد الاسم الاعظم الذی به ارتعدت فرائص العالم و استبرک بقدومه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech
